title: Efficiency Versus Growth
summary: Separates AI business value into efficiency effects and growth effects so the operating model and ROI case stay clear.
claims: AI value should be separated into efficiency and growth conversations.
Efficiency focuses on cost, time, friction, and standardization.
Growth focuses on output, conversion, customer relevance, and scaling strategic capacity.
proof_points: The existing Joz proof base already includes both growth outcomes and operational friction reduction.
Separating these frames helps avoid vague ROI language.
This distinction matches how leaders evaluate cost programs versus growth programs.
